rulings.Case Title: PIRUZ VARGA VS. REGENTS UNIV., OF CALIFORNIA SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, February 7, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANTS WILLIAM LEW, ROBERT EATON, ARA TAHMASSIAN, KEITH CUDABACK, AND THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT THAT HE WAS ENGAGED IN A PROTECTED ACTIVITY OR THAT HIS TERMINATION RESULTED FROM RETALIATORY ANIMUS. IN FACT THE EVIDENCE IS CLEAR THAT HIS TERMINATION WAS BASED SOLEY ON LEGITIMATE PERFORMANCE ISSUES AND THAT THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT THESE REASONS WERE PRETEXTUAL. FURTHER, THE INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS AGAINST DEFENDANTS CUDABACK, TAHMASSIAN & EATON FAIL BECAUSE THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT ANY OF THEM WERE INVOLVED IN THE DECISION TO TERMINATE PLAINTIFF. FINALLY, DEFENDANT REGENTS IS IMMUNE FROM LIABILITY PER PALMER V. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA (2003) 107 CAL.APP.4TH 899, 909. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: JORDAN ROSENBERG VS. CORNELL CORRECTIONS OF CALIFORNIA INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motio Top Compel Discovery Responses ; Motion For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, February 7, 2011, line 1, PLAINTIFF JORDAN ROSENBERG'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses ; Motion For Monetary Sanctions. DENY. PLAINTIFF'S MOTIONS ARE DEFECTIVE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1345. BECAUSE DEFENDANT RESPONDED TO PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY REQUESTS, PLAINTIFF NEEDED TO PROVIDE A SEPARATE STATEMENT TO SUPPORT THESE MOTIONS. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: TOM J. BENO VS. JPMORGAN CHASE, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, February 7, 2011, line 4, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO PLEAD WITH MORE PARTICULARITY THE FACTS OF THE NON-FIDUCIARY CONFIDENTIAL RELATIONSHIP. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION OVERRULED. =(302/LMG)
